== Notes for [[Item:Q1177|Q1177]] ==

Ancestor of Haplogroup T
<p>A rare but widespread one associated with early agriculture. Most common in Somalia now but found in many people like Thomas Jefferson
<p>Thomas is kinda Thomas Jefferson back then. The most evil interpretation
<p>Father of Yakub and moved to the area around Gobekli Tepe, while his brother Elam founded the Indus Valley civilization.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671615F8F01341EFBC0B9822EF79916CA396
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
